@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(async_await(loadUser))
C: same_order ∧ one_next(err) ∧ session.userId_authoritative
P: promisify(db.findUser) → await(db.findUser) → await(audit.log) → await(cache.set)
V: missing_id ∧ db_error_via_next(err) ∧ user_not_found
R: ! preserve_this_binding ∧ ! duplicate_callback
A: "ok(next(null,user))"

[AUDIT]
Refactor async await(loadUser) to async/await with minimal behavior change, preserve same validation order, single next(err) path, and verify the single next(err) path.
